violations.description: CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored in the empolyee restroom due to insufficient storage space in the rest of the building.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cases of cups and other single service item noted being stored in an unapproved location.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Toilet room door noted not self closing.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): Observed low-splash bleach being used in 3 compartment sink for sanitation of utensils and equipment.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored in toilet room. Observed ingredients and beverages stored in employee restroom.
STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Observed clean coffee pots and clean food storage containers are stored in employee restroom.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Toilet room door noted not self closing.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single use cups and lids noted being stored in the employee restroom.
